text.autoconfig.mob_better_config.option: Give Blaze a custom boss-style name when enabled.
Base health value of the Blaze.
Distance at which Blaze detects and follows targets.
Multiplier applied to Blaze fireball damage.
Number of fireballs shot per attack burst.
Cooldown in ticks between fireball bursts.
Time Blaze spends charging before firing.
Multiplier applied to Blaze vertical movement boost.
Controls how slowly the Blaze falls.
If enabled, Blaze will take damage from water.
Chance for Blaze to summon reinforcements.
Chance that a spawned Blaze becomes a boss.
Boss Blaze will have a glowing outline.
Boss Blaze will have a special custom name.
Enable a custom name for Cave Spiders.
Base health of the Cave Spider.
Armor value that reduces incoming damage.
Base melee damage dealt by the Cave Spider.
Knockback applied when the Cave Spider hits a target.
Movement speed multiplier for the Cave Spider.
Distance at which the Cave Spider detects and follows targets.
If enabled, Cave Spiders will not take fire damage.
Applies a glowing outline to the Cave Spider.
Multiplier for the number of Cave Spiders spawning.
Chance for Cave Spiders to call reinforcements.
If enabled, Cave Spider attacks apply poison.
Enable boss behavior for Cave Spiders.
All Cave Spiders will spawn as bosses.
Chance that a Cave Spider spawns as a boss.
Health multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
Damage multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
XP multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
Loot multiplier for boss Cave Spiders.
Boss Cave Spiders will have a custom name.
